name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Experience pure sound with our industry-leading noise cancellation. Perfect for travel, work, and relaxation. Features 30-hour battery life and exceptional comfort. The advanced driver technology delivers immersive audio with deep bass and crystal-clear highs. Includes premium carrying case and airline adapter.

name: Minimalist Smartwatch
description: Stay connected in style. Tracks your heart rate, steps, and sleep. Water-resistant up to 50 meters and features a beautiful AMOLED always-on display. Battery lasts up to 7 days on a single charge. Compatible with both iOS and Android devices.

name: Premium Leather Backpack
description: Handcrafted from genuine full-grain leather. Features a padded laptop compartment that fits up to 15-inch laptops, multiple interior pockets for organization, and a hidden zipper pocket for valuables. Water-resistant lining and heavy-duty brass hardware.

name: Professional DSLR Camera
description: Capture the world in stunning detail with this professional-grade DSLR. Features a 24.2 MP APS-C sensor, advanced 45-point cross-type autofocus system, and 4K video recording at 30fps. Includes 18-55mm kit lens, camera bag, and 32GB SD card. Perfect for both photography enthusiasts and professionals.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Designed for long hours of comfortable work. Features adjustable lumbar support, breathable mesh back, synchronized tilt mechanism, and 4D adjustable armrests. Padded premium fabric seat with waterfall edge. Supports up to 300 lbs and comes with 10-year warranty.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile blue switches for satisfying key presses. Features durable aluminum frame, per-key RGB lighting with 16.8 million colors, dedicated media keys, and customizable macro keys. USB-C connection with detachable braided cable.

name: Wireless Earbuds Pro
description: Premium true wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and transparency mode. Features 11mm custom drivers for exceptional sound quality, 8-hour battery life (32 hours with charging case), wireless charging support, and IPX4 water resistance. Crystal-clear call quality with 6 microphones.

name: Designer Sunglasses
description: Classic aviator style sunglasses with polarized UV400 lenses. Frame made from lightweight titanium with spring hinges for comfortable fit. Perfect for driving, outdoor activities, or everyday wear. Includes premium leather case and cleaning cloth.

name: Smart Home Speaker
description: Premium smart speaker with built-in voice assistant. Features 360-degree room-filling sound, far-field voice recognition, and multi-room audio support. Control smart home devices, play music, set alarms, and get answers to questions hands-free.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Extra-thick 6mm yoga mat with alignment lines. Made from eco-friendly TPE material that is non-toxic and recyclable. Excellent grip even during hot yoga. Includes carrying strap and comes in multiple beautiful colors. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and floor exercises.

name: Portable Power Bank
description: 20000mAh high-capacity portable charger with fast charging support. Features dual USB-A ports and one USB-C port with Power Delivery. Charges 3 devices simultaneously. LED indicator shows remaining battery. Compact design fits easily in pocket or bag.

name: Running Shoes Pro
description: Professional running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Features carbon fiber plate for energy return and durable rubber outsole for traction. Designed for both daily training and race day. Available in multiple width options.
